about.heading: Real programs. Qualified trainers. No fluff.
about.body:
Peak Form Training has operated out of South Yarra for six years. Every trainer holds a Cert IV in Fitness and current first-aid certification. We work with clients across inner Melbourne — from first-timers who've never set foot in a gym to competitive athletes chasing performance targets.

The studio is small by design. No crowded floors, no waiting for equipment. Sessions run to the minute, programs are tracked weekly and results are measured in concrete metrics: lifts, times, body composition — not vague feelings.
about.licence: Cert IV Fitness | First Aid certified

service_area.heading: Covering inner Melbourne
service_area.intro: We train clients across South Yarra, Toorak, Prahran, Armadale, Malvern, St Kilda, Brighton and Hawthorn. Online coaching is available Australia-wide.

services.title: 1-on-1 Personal Training
services.summary: Fully tailored training sessions with a dedicated qualified trainer — strength, conditioning, weight management or sport-specific.
services.intro:
1-on-1 personal training at Peak Form means every session is planned in advance, tracked as you go and adjusted based on what you actually did last time. There's no generic template — your program reflects your current fitness level, schedule and specific goals.

Sessions run for 45 or 60 minutes at our South Yarra studio. The trainer is fully focused on you for the entire session: form correction, load management, rest timing and the kind of honest feedback that accelerates progress. Packages start at five sessions and scale up to monthly unlimited blocks.
benefits: Program designed from your first assessment session
45 or 60-minute sessions, fully one-on-one
Load and progress tracked every week
Form correction throughout every set
Flexible scheduling — sessions available 6am to 8pm weekdays
No lock-in contracts — buy sessions in blocks or casually

sections.heading: How your program is built
sections.body:
The first session is a movement assessment and goal-setting conversation. The trainer establishes your baseline — current strength, mobility, any injury history and what you're actually trying to achieve. From that, they build a 4–8 week training block with specific targets for each session.

Every session result is logged. When you hit a target consistently, the program advances. When something isn't working, it gets changed. This is the part most gym memberships skip entirely.

sections.heading: Pricing and session packages
sections.body:
Casual sessions are available at $115 each. Block packages reduce the per-session cost: 5 sessions for $475, 10 sessions for $895, or a monthly unlimited package at $380/month for up to 4 sessions per week. All sessions are 45 minutes by default; 60-minute sessions are available at a surcharge.

Package credits don't expire within 12 months of purchase. Unused credits are refundable if you can no longer train.

faqs.question: Do I need any gym experience before starting?
faqs.answer: No experience is required. The assessment session establishes your starting point and the program is built accordingly. Beginners are common at Peak Form — the trainer adjusts the load and complexity to match where you are, not where they'd prefer you to be.

faqs.question: What does the first session cover?
faqs.answer: The first session is a 45-minute assessment covering your movement baseline, injury history, current fitness level and goals. You'll also do a short training block so the trainer can observe how you move under load. This is provided free of charge for all new clients.

faqs.question: Can I train if I have an existing injury?
faqs.answer: Yes, but we need to know about it before we build your program. For post-surgical or complex injuries, we'll ask for clearance from your GP or physio and coordinate with them on any restrictions. We won't load movements that are contraindicated.

seo.title: 1-on-1 Personal Training South Yarra | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Tailored 1-on-1 personal training sessions at our South Yarra studio. Strength, conditioning and weight management programs tracked weekly. From $95/session, no lock-in contracts.

services.title: Small Group Training
services.summary: Train with 2–4 people at shared cost — structured programming with a qualified trainer, available most days at the South Yarra studio.
services.intro:
Small group training at Peak Form sits between a 1-on-1 session and a group fitness class. Groups are capped at four people, so the trainer can actually coach each person through their movement — not just call out a circuit from across the room.

The program is written for the group as a whole but scaled to individual capacity. If one person is working toward strength and another toward endurance, the loading and rest times are adjusted accordingly. You train together, but you're not all doing the same weight.
benefits: Groups capped at 4 — genuine coaching, not just supervision
Program scaled to each individual's capacity
Available as regular scheduled sessions or formed with your own group
Lower cost per session than 1-on-1 training
Mix of strength, conditioning and mobility in each session
Trainer tracks individual progress across sessions

sections.heading: Forming your group
sections.body:
You can join an existing scheduled group or bring 2–3 other people and form your own. The trainer will run an initial assessment for each group member and set a baseline for each. Groups that form together typically share similar fitness goals, which makes programming more consistent.

Scheduled group spots open each Monday for the following week. Casual spots can be filled if a group has capacity.

sections.heading: Pricing
sections.body: Per-person pricing starts at $55 for a 45-minute group session. Block packs of 10 sessions per person reduce this to $49/session. Bringing your own group of 3–4 gets an additional 10% discount across the block. Groups booked together use a shared session credit pool.

faqs.question: Can I join a group if I don't know anyone in it?
faqs.answer: Yes. We run scheduled open groups where individuals book in. The trainer introduces everyone at the start of the first session and establishes the group baseline. Most people find the social element helpful for accountability.

faqs.question: What if one person in the group is much fitter than the others?
faqs.answer: The trainer scales each person's load and intensity. You're doing the same movements and working in the same time windows, but the actual weight or difficulty is adjusted per person. The program accounts for different capacity levels from the start.

seo.title: Small Group Training South Yarra | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Small group personal training (2–4 people) in South Yarra. Qualified trainer, structured programming, from $55/person per session. Join an existing group or bring your own.

services.title: Online Coaching
services.summary: Full programming, weekly check-ins and form reviews delivered remotely — train at your gym or at home, coached by a qualified trainer.
services.intro:
Online coaching from Peak Form is a structured remote training service — not a generic app subscription. You get a qualified trainer who writes your program, reviews your form via video, tracks your progress and adjusts the plan monthly based on results.

The service suits people who travel frequently, live outside inner Melbourne or prefer training at their own gym without paying studio session rates. Programs are delivered weekly with full exercise descriptions, video demonstrations and loading targets. Check-ins happen every Sunday via a brief form review — you report, the trainer adjusts.
benefits: Custom program written for your specific goals and equipment access
Weekly check-in via structured form submission
Form video review with written feedback within 24 hours
Monthly program update based on progress data
Nutrition guidance included — practical, not prescriptive
Available Australia-wide, no studio attendance required

sections.heading: What's included each month
sections.body:
Each monthly coaching block covers: an updated 4-week training program (3–5 days/week depending on your schedule), weekly check-in review, up to three form video reviews, and a nutrition guidelines document. Programs are written for your actual equipment — home gym, commercial gym or minimal setup.

The first month includes a longer onboarding call (30 minutes) to establish goals, training history and preferences. After that, communication is primarily via the weekly check-in system.

sections.heading: Pricing tiers
sections.body: Standard coaching is $149/month and covers the full service described above. The premium tier at $229/month adds fortnightly 20-minute video calls, priority same-day responses and a dedicated WhatsApp channel for quick questions. Both tiers are month-to-month — cancel anytime before your next billing date.

faqs.question: What equipment do I need?
faqs.answer: Programs are written around whatever you have access to. A commercial gym membership gives the most flexibility. Home gym programs are available for those with dumbbells, a barbell and a bench. Minimal equipment programs (resistance bands and bodyweight) are possible but come with limitations on strength progression.

faqs.question: How do I submit form videos?
faqs.answer: Videos are submitted via the weekly check-in form — you upload a short clip directly. The trainer reviews it and sends written notes on corrections within 24 hours. For complex form issues, a short video response from the trainer can be requested.

seo.title: Online Coaching Melbourne | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Remote personal training from Peak Form. Custom programming, weekly check-ins and form video reviews from $149/month. Available Australia-wide, no studio required.

services.title: Body Transformation Program
services.summary: A 12-week structured program combining training sessions, nutrition guidance and accountability check-ins — for people who want a clear plan with a defined endpoint.
services.intro:
The 12-week body transformation program at Peak Form is a complete package: three weekly training sessions, a structured nutrition framework, weekly progress measurements and biweekly coaching reviews. The goal is to give you enough time to see real, measurable change — not a quick fix followed by a regression.

The program suits people who've been in and out of the gym without consistent results and want a structured approach with genuine accountability. It's not a crash program. Training loads increase progressively. Nutrition targets are realistic and adjusted based on weekly results rather than locked to a generic calorie number.
benefits: Three 45-minute training sessions per week at the studio
Personalised nutrition framework — not a generic meal plan
Weekly body composition measurements and progress review
Biweekly 1-on-1 coaching check-in (in-person or video)
Full program booklet with session-by-session progressions
Transition plan provided at program end to maintain results

sections.heading: How the 12 weeks are structured
sections.body:
Weeks 1–4 focus on movement quality and establishing training baselines. The loads are deliberately conservative to reduce injury risk and build the habits. Weeks 5–8 ramp intensity and introduce more complex compound movements. Weeks 9–12 push to peak loads and refine technique under fatigue.

Nutrition targets are set at the start and adjusted every fortnight. Progress is measured weekly via weight, photos and key lifts — the data drives the adjustments, not guesswork.

sections.heading: Pricing and inclusions
sections.body:
The full 12-week program is $1,890 (three sessions per week). An intensive version with five sessions per week is $2,650. Both include all coaching reviews, nutrition framework and the transition plan. A deposit of $500 secures your start date. The balance is due before week one begins.

A two-person version (you and a training partner) is available at $1,490 per person — same program, same structure, sessions run together.

faqs.question: Is the nutrition component a strict diet?
faqs.answer: No. The nutrition framework sets protein and calorie targets and offers practical meal structures — it doesn't prescribe a specific diet or eliminate food groups. The targets are adjusted every two weeks based on actual progress. If you're not hitting targets consistently, the trainer works with you on practical barriers, not just willpower.

faqs.question: What happens after the 12 weeks?
faqs.answer: Every program ends with a full review session and a written transition plan covering maintenance training and nutrition targets. Most clients move to ongoing 1-on-1 or group sessions after completing the program. There's no pressure to continue — the plan is designed to give you the tools to maintain results independently if you prefer.

seo.title: 12-Week Body Transformation Program South Yarra | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Structured 12-week program: three weekly training sessions, nutrition guidance and weekly check-ins. From $1,890. South Yarra studio. No fad diets, no crash training.

services.title: Strength & Conditioning
services.summary: Progressive strength programs for athletes, returning gym-goers and anyone who wants to lift heavier consistently. Periodised, tracked and adjusted monthly.
services.intro:
Strength and conditioning training at Peak Form follows a periodised structure — not a random selection of exercises. Each training block has a specific goal (hypertrophy, maximal strength, peaking, deload) and the program advances based on measured results rather than arbitrary time windows.

The approach suits competitive athletes who need structured off-season programming, recreational lifters who've plateaued on self-written programs, and sport-specific clients whose coaches have requested supplementary conditioning work. Sessions at the South Yarra studio use free weights, barbells and conditioning equipment.
benefits: Periodised training blocks with defined strength targets
Competition and sports performance programming available
Barbell compound movements as the foundation
Conditioning work integrated without compromising strength gains
Deload weeks built into the program to manage fatigue
Monthly max testing to track strength gains accurately

sections.heading: Who this is for
sections.body:
Strength and conditioning sessions work well for: recreational lifters who want a structured program beyond the basics; athletes in football, rugby, basketball or tennis who need off-season strength work; clients who've followed bodybuilding-style programs and want to shift to performance-based training; and anyone who's hit a strength plateau and needs a fresh programming approach.

Sessions involve heavier compound lifts (squat, deadlift, press, row variations) plus targeted accessory work and conditioning. They're physically demanding — the trainer sets load targets at or above current maxes.

sections.heading: Sport-specific programming
sections.body: For clients with a specific sport or competition target, the trainer builds a program backwards from that date — peaking the relevant physical qualities at the right time. For a team sport athlete, this typically means power and speed development in the pre-season, strength base in the off-season and maintenance during the competition period. Coordination with coaching staff is possible on request.

faqs.question: Do I need to be experienced with barbell training?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily, but some baseline familiarity with compound movements helps. If you're new to barbell work, the first few sessions focus on technique before loads increase. The trainer won't add weight until form is reliable under lighter loads.

faqs.question: Can strength training be combined with cardio goals?
faqs.answer: Yes, but there are trade-offs. Maximising both simultaneously is difficult — the programming will prioritise one quality and support the other. The trainer will discuss your primary goal at assessment and design accordingly. If you want to get stronger and also run a half marathon, the program can accommodate both, but the loading for each will be moderated.

seo.title: Strength & Conditioning Training South Yarra | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Periodised strength and conditioning programs for athletes and recreational lifters in South Yarra. Barbell-based, tracked monthly. From $95/session.

services.title: Post-Injury & Rehabilitation Training
services.summary: Exercise programming to support your return to full movement after injury or surgery — coordinated with your physio or GP, not a replacement for medical care.
services.intro:
Post-injury training at Peak Form is structured exercise programming for people who have completed or are partway through medical rehabilitation and need qualified guidance returning to full training. The trainer works alongside your physiotherapist or GP — not instead of them.

Sessions are built around any restrictions or progressions set by your treating practitioner. The trainer communicates directly with your physio if you're comfortable with that, coordinates on load restrictions and adapts the program as your clearances change. Sessions are held at the South Yarra studio using controlled equipment loads.
benefits: Program designed around your specific injury and medical clearances
Direct communication with your physio or GP on request
Gradual load progression — not rushed return to full training
Regular reassessment as clearances are updated
Pain and discomfort monitoring at every session
Documentation available for your treating practitioner

sections.heading: Common post-injury scenarios we support
sections.body:
We work with clients recovering from knee replacements and ACL reconstructions, rotator cuff repairs, hip replacements, lower back disc injuries, ankle ligament reconstructions and general sport-related muscle strains. The trainer needs written clearance or a GP referral for post-surgical cases before the first session.

For chronic conditions (lower back pain, osteoarthritis, hypermobility), the trainer coordinates with the treating practitioner to understand contraindications and build a safe exercise framework around them.

sections.heading: What to bring to the first session
sections.body: Bring any written instructions, restrictions or programs from your physiotherapist or surgeon. If you have imaging reports (MRI, X-ray) and your practitioner is happy for the trainer to review them, that's useful context but not required. The session starts with a structured movement screen focused on the injured area — loads don't increase until quality of movement meets a safe threshold.

faqs.question: Is this a replacement for physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: No. Post-injury training at Peak Form is exercise programming that supports your physiotherapy plan — it doesn't replace it. If you haven't seen a physio for your injury, we'll recommend you do before starting. We're a fitness service, not a medical or allied health service.

faqs.question: How do you decide what I can and can't do in a session?
faqs.answer: The first session includes a movement assessment that identifies pain-free ranges of motion and any compensatory patterns. The trainer sets initial load and range limits based on this assessment and any written instructions from your treating practitioner. Limits are updated at each session based on how you respond.

seo.title: Post-Injury Rehabilitation Training South Yarra | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Exercise programming for post-injury and post-surgical recovery in South Yarra. Works alongside your physio plan. From $110/session. Qualified trainers, structured approach.

locations.headline: Personal Training in South Yarra — Peak Form Studio
locations.intro: Peak Form Training is based at Studio 3, 221 Toorak Rd, South Yarra. The studio sits a short walk from Jam Factory and the South Yarra train station, making it accessible before work, at lunch or after 5pm.
locations.body:
South Yarra is a suburb where the demand for serious training is high and the options are spread across franchise gyms and boutique studios. Peak Form focuses on what the franchise gyms can't: a qualified trainer dedicated to your session, a program that advances based on your data and a studio environment where you can actually concentrate.

Clients from South Yarra cover the full range — professionals fitting sessions around work schedules, young athletes in off-season training, returning gym-goers who want structured programming and older adults managing chronic conditions with exercise. The studio is equipped for strength and conditioning work, not group classes.
benefits: Studio is a 5-minute walk from South Yarra station
Sessions run 6am–8pm weekdays, 7am–1pm Saturday
Private studio — no queuing for equipment
All programs tracked and updated weekly

sections.heading: Getting to the studio
sections.body: The studio is at 221 Toorak Rd — a few doors east of Jam Factory. Street parking is available on Toorak Rd and in the surrounding streets. The South Yarra train station (Glen Waverley, Cranbourne and Pakenham lines) is a 6-minute walk. Tram routes 58 and 8 stop directly on Chapel Street nearby.

faqs.question: Do I need my own training gear?
faqs.answer: Bring comfortable training clothes and a water bottle. The studio provides all equipment. Training shoes with a flat sole are recommended for strength work — running shoes are acceptable but soles with excessive cushioning make barbell lifts less stable.

seo.title: Personal Training South Yarra | Peak Form Training Studio
seo.description: Peak Form Training studio is located in South Yarra on Toorak Rd. 1-on-1 training, small groups and 12-week programs. Walk from South Yarra station.

locations.headline: Personal Trainer in Toorak | Peak Form Training
locations.intro: Toorak clients train at our South Yarra studio on Toorak Rd — a direct 5-minute drive or a short walk from Toorak Village. We also offer early morning and evening sessions to suit professional schedules.
locations.body:
Toorak is directly adjacent to our South Yarra studio. Most Toorak clients drive to the studio on Toorak Rd or walk from Toorak Village — the location is central to the area. Sessions are available from 6am for early risers and until 8pm for those finishing later in the day.

Toorak clients at Peak Form tend to be after specific outcomes — weight management alongside professional schedules, strength programs for recreational sport, or structured programs after a period away from training. The trainer writes a program based on the initial assessment, not on a generic template.
benefits: Studio accessible via Toorak Rd — 5 minutes from Toorak Village
Evening sessions available until 8pm weekdays
Programs structured around professional schedules
Small group options for Toorak clients with friends or colleagues

sections.heading: Training alongside a professional schedule
sections.body: Many Toorak clients work long hours and need training sessions that fit reliably around meetings and travel. Peak Form accommodates this with flexible scheduling — sessions can be rescheduled with 24 hours notice and early morning blocks (6am, 6:45am, 7:30am) are popular with pre-work clients. Block packages don't expire, so a busy week doesn't mean a lost session.

faqs.question: Is there parking near the studio?
faqs.answer: Yes. There is metered street parking on Toorak Rd and in the surrounding side streets. Parking is generally easier in the early morning and evening sessions than at lunchtime.

seo.title: Personal Trainer Toorak | Peak Form Training South Yarra Studio
seo.description: Personal training for Toorak residents at Peak Form's South Yarra studio. 5 minutes from Toorak Village. 1-on-1 and small group sessions, from $95/session.

locations.headline: Personal Training in Prahran | Peak Form Training
locations.intro: Peak Form Training serves Prahran clients at our South Yarra studio on Toorak Rd — a short ride from Prahran Market and accessible via the 72 tram on Chapel Street.
locations.body:
Prahran sits a few blocks from our South Yarra studio and many clients walk or tram from the surrounding streets. The studio is designed for focused, structured training — no equipment queues, no background music designed to keep you on cardio machines, just a program and a trainer.

Prahran clients at Peak Form include people from the hospitality and creative industries with irregular hours who need flexible session booking, younger clients new to structured training, and those returning after a break who want accountability rather than just a gym floor to use.
benefits: Accessible via Chapel Street tram (route 72) from Prahran
Flexible early and late session times around shift work
No joining fees or membership requirements
Post-injury programming for clients with existing conditions

sections.heading: Flexible scheduling for irregular schedules
sections.body: Clients in hospitality, retail and the creative sector often work non-standard hours. Peak Form's scheduling system lets you book sessions within 2 hours of the start time if spots are available. Block packages have 12-month expiry and sessions can be moved with 24 hours' notice. This makes structured training practical even when your week changes from one day to the next.

faqs.question: Can I come in without a booking?
faqs.answer: Sessions need to be booked in advance — the trainer prepares your program before you arrive. Same-day bookings are available if there's a spot free, but we recommend booking at least a day ahead to guarantee your session.

seo.title: Personal Trainer Prahran | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Personal training for Prahran clients at our South Yarra studio. Flexible scheduling, 1-on-1 and group sessions. Short tram ride from Chapel Street.

locations.headline: Personal Training in Armadale | Peak Form Training
locations.intro: Armadale clients train at our South Yarra studio, a direct drive along Toorak Rd or High Street. We see a mix of strength, performance and body composition clients from the Armadale area.
locations.body:
Armadale's residential streets are a short drive from the Peak Form studio on Toorak Rd. The studio is easily accessible from Kooyong Rd, High Street and the surrounding area. Most Armadale clients drive and find parking on Toorak Rd within a few minutes.

Peak Form attracts Armadale clients who want more than a gym floor — people who've outgrown self-directed training and want a qualified trainer writing and tracking their program. The 12-week body transformation program is particularly popular with clients from this area who are looking for a defined structure.
benefits: Direct access via Toorak Rd from Armadale
Strength and performance programs for competitive athletes
12-week structured program popular with Armadale clients
Group sessions available for friends training together

sections.heading: What Armadale clients train for
sections.body: The Armadale client base at Peak Form includes recreational tennis and golf players looking to improve their physical performance, professionals in their 30s and 40s who want structured training rather than gym floor guesswork, and people who have tried multiple programs without measuring results. The trainer's approach — tracking loads, adjusting the program based on data and setting clear targets — addresses the main reason people stop making progress.

faqs.question: How long before I see results from personal training?
faqs.answer: Most clients notice measurable changes in strength and energy levels within 4–6 weeks of consistent training. Body composition changes typically take 8–12 weeks to be clearly visible. The trainer tracks specific metrics from the first session so progress is measured objectively, not just felt.

seo.title: Personal Trainer Armadale | Peak Form Training South Yarra
seo.description: Personal training for Armadale clients at Peak Form's South Yarra studio. Strength, conditioning and 12-week transformation programs. Qualified trainers, tracked weekly.

locations.headline: Personal Training in Malvern | Peak Form Training
locations.intro: Malvern clients travel to our South Yarra studio via Toorak Rd or High Street — a 10-minute drive from the Malvern central area. We offer morning, lunchtime and evening sessions.
locations.body:
Malvern is a 10–12 minute drive from the Peak Form studio, making it a practical training destination for clients who don't want to train at a franchise gym close to home. The studio's private format means you get a genuine training session — not a shared floor.

Several Malvern-based clients commute to the studio as part of their work routine, stopping in before heading to the CBD. The studio is open from 6am weekdays, which suits early-morning preferences. The strength and conditioning program is particularly popular with Malvern clients involved in sport or those who have a history of training and want to resume at an appropriate level.
benefits: 10-minute drive from Malvern Central along Toorak Rd
Early morning session slots from 6am
Strength programs for sport and recreational athletes
Post-injury training for Malvern clients with existing conditions

sections.heading: What sets structured training apart
sections.body: Malvern has a number of commercial gyms and boutique studios. What Peak Form offers is different: every session is planned in advance, the trainer is fully present, and the program advances based on what you did last session — not on a fixed schedule. For clients who've used gyms for years without systematic progress, this is a meaningful change in approach.

faqs.question: Can I try one session before committing to a package?
faqs.answer: Yes. The first assessment session is free for all new clients. After that, casual sessions are available before purchasing a block. Most clients find a block more cost-effective and easier to plan around — but there's no pressure to commit until you've experienced the training.

seo.title: Personal Trainer Malvern | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Personal training for Malvern clients at our South Yarra studio. Strength, conditioning and injury rehabilitation programs. 10 minutes from Malvern Central.

locations.headline: Personal Training in St Kilda | Peak Form Training
locations.intro: St Kilda clients reach our South Yarra studio via St Kilda Rd or the 3/67 tram routes. The studio is 15 minutes from Fitzroy Street and a direct route along St Kilda Rd.
locations.body:
St Kilda has no shortage of gym options, but Peak Form offers something different: a small private studio with a qualified trainer and a structured program. No crowded floors, no impersonal group classes — just a trainer who knows what you did last session and has planned what comes next.

St Kilda clients at Peak Form include people who train for aesthetic goals alongside active lifestyles, athletes from the local football and basketball clubs, and individuals managing chronic conditions who benefit from exercise programming that works around their limitations.
benefits: Direct tram access from St Kilda via routes 3 and 67
Training programs suited to active and social lifestyles
Body transformation program for structured 12-week results
Post-injury support for clients with existing conditions

sections.heading: Training that fits an active lifestyle
sections.body: Many St Kilda clients already have active social lives — beach walks, recreational sport, cycling. Peak Form builds training programs that complement existing activity rather than compete with it. If you're already walking 8,000 steps daily and playing social tennis, the trainer adjusts the program volume accordingly — not just stacking additional sessions on top.

faqs.question: Can I book online or by phone?
faqs.answer: The easiest way to start is by calling us on (03) 9826 4411 to set up your free assessment session. From there, the trainer will walk you through how to book ongoing sessions.

seo.title: Personal Trainer St Kilda | Peak Form Training South Yarra
seo.description: Personal training for St Kilda clients. 15 minutes from Fitzroy Street. 1-on-1 sessions, group training and 12-week programs at our South Yarra studio.

locations.headline: Personal Training in Brighton | Peak Form Training
locations.intro: Brighton clients travel to our South Yarra studio for structured programming that their local gym options don't provide — a 20-minute drive along Nepean Highway or the Sandringham train line to South Yarra station.
locations.body:
Brighton is further from the South Yarra studio than most of our regular catchment, but we have a consistent group of Brighton-based clients who make the trip specifically because of the programming quality. The drive along Nepean Highway takes 20–25 minutes in standard traffic and is a practical commute for early morning sessions.

Brighton clients tend to be established in their careers and looking for training that delivers results without wasted time. The 12-week transformation program and the online coaching option are both popular with clients from this area — the latter because it eliminates the commute entirely.
benefits: 20-minute drive from Brighton to South Yarra studio
Online coaching available for Brighton clients who prefer no commute
12-week program popular with Brighton clients seeking structure
Evening slots available for post-work arrivals from Brighton

sections.heading: Online coaching as an alternative
sections.body: For Brighton clients who don't want to make the commute to the studio, online coaching provides the same programming and check-in structure delivered remotely. You train at a commercial gym close to home — we write the program, review your form via video and adjust monthly. Several Brighton clients use a hybrid arrangement: studio sessions once per week for direct coaching, supplemented by two online-programmed sessions.

faqs.question: Is online coaching as effective as in-person training?
faqs.answer: For experienced clients who already have reliable technique, online coaching delivers comparable results because the programming quality is the same. For beginners or those with technique issues, the first few months of in-person training establish foundations that make the remote format significantly more effective.

seo.title: Personal Trainer Brighton Melbourne | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Personal training for Brighton clients at our South Yarra studio. Online coaching also available — same programming, no commute. 12-week programs from $1,890.

locations.headline: Personal Training in Hawthorn | Peak Form Training
locations.intro: Hawthorn clients reach our South Yarra studio in 15 minutes via Toorak Rd, or by train to South Yarra station from Hawthorn station on the Glen Waverley or Alamein lines.
locations.body:
Hawthorn is well connected to South Yarra by both road and rail. The train takes around 12 minutes from Hawthorn station to South Yarra station, making it a straightforward commute for early morning sessions before work in the CBD.

Peak Form serves a mix of Hawthorn clients: university students wanting structured training, professionals in their 30s managing desk-job physiques, and sport-specific athletes from the local clubs. The strength and conditioning program sees consistent interest from Hawthorn clients involved in football, rowing and tennis.
benefits: Train from Hawthorn station direct to South Yarra (12 minutes)
Strength programs suited to football, rowing and tennis athletes
Group sessions for students training with flatmates or teammates
Morning sessions from 6am for pre-work commuters

sections.heading: Sport-specific training for Hawthorn athletes
sections.body: Hawthorn has a strong sporting culture — local clubs in football, cricket, rowing and basketball all draw members who want to improve their physical performance. Peak Form's strength and conditioning programming for athletes is based on their specific sport demands: power development for football, endurance base for rowing, rotational strength for cricket and tennis. The trainer can liaise with club coaches if you have an existing program framework to work within.

faqs.question: Do you offer student discounts?
faqs.answer: We offer group session pricing that's popular with students — $55/person for small group training makes it significantly cheaper than 1-on-1 sessions. Students who bring a training partner or two can access the same coaching quality at a lower per-person cost. Contact us to discuss options.

seo.title: Personal Trainer Hawthorn | Peak Form Training South Yarra
seo.description: Personal training for Hawthorn clients. 12-minute train to South Yarra station. Strength, conditioning and group training programs. Sport-specific programming available.

service_areas.headline: 1-on-1 Personal Training in South Yarra
service_areas.intro: South Yarra is where Peak Form Training is based. Studio sessions run from 6am at our Toorak Rd studio, with trainers available across all key time slots.
service_areas.body:
South Yarra clients have direct access to the Peak Form studio on Toorak Rd. 1-on-1 personal training here means a dedicated trainer, a private studio environment and a program that advances week by week based on tracked results.

The South Yarra training market has a high density of boutique studios and franchise gyms. What Peak Form offers is different: sessions are planned in advance, loads are tracked to the kilogram, and the program changes when the data says it should — not on a fixed rotation. The trainer brings your session plan to each session and adjusts based on how you performed last time.

For South Yarra residents, the location on Toorak Rd means sessions are practical before work, at lunch or after 5pm. Parking is available on Toorak Rd and surrounding streets, and the studio is a 6-minute walk from South Yarra train station.
benefits: Based in South Yarra — no commute for local clients
Private studio with no equipment wait times
Sessions available 6am–8pm weekdays and 7am–1pm Saturdays
Programs tracked and advanced based on weekly data

sections.heading: Why South Yarra clients choose Peak Form
sections.body:
South Yarra has options — but most of them are either expensive boutique studios charging $150+ per session, large commercial gyms with no programming support, or group fitness formats that don't adapt to individual needs. Peak Form sits in between: qualified 1-on-1 training at a competitive rate with genuine programming rigour.

New South Yarra clients typically come from one of three backgrounds: people who've been going to a gym without measurable progress, people returning after a break who need a structured re-entry, and people who've hit a plateau on self-written programs and want an objective set of eyes on their training.

faqs.question: How do I get started?
faqs.answer: Call (03) 9826 4411 or email info@peakformtraining.com.au to book your free assessment session. The first session establishes your baseline and we'll discuss which program format suits your goals and schedule.

seo.title: Personal Training South Yarra | Peak Form — Studio on Toorak Rd
seo.description: 1-on-1 personal training at Peak Form's South Yarra studio. Structured programs, tracked weekly. 6am start times. Walk from South Yarra station. From $95/session.

service_areas.headline: Small Group Training for Toorak Clients
service_areas.intro: Group training sessions at our South Yarra studio are a practical option for Toorak clients wanting qualified coaching at a shared cost. The studio is a short drive along Toorak Rd.
service_areas.body:
Small group training at Peak Form suits Toorak clients who want structured programming without the full cost of 1-on-1 sessions. Groups run at 2–4 people, capped to maintain coaching quality. The program is built for the group's shared goals and scaled per individual — you train together but you're not all lifting the same weight.

Toorak clients often book group sessions with colleagues, neighbours or training partners they already know. Bringing your own group of 3–4 gets an additional 10% discount on block purchases. The trainer manages the group dynamic, paces each person appropriately and tracks individual progress across sessions.

Sessions are scheduled across the week in morning and evening blocks. Toorak Road provides a direct 5-minute drive to the studio from most parts of Toorak, and street parking is generally available at both early morning and evening times.
benefits: Groups capped at 4 — genuine coaching not just supervision
5-minute drive from Toorak Village along Toorak Rd
Discount for groups of 3–4 who book together
Individual scaling within group sessions

sections.heading: Forming a Toorak group
sections.body: Several Toorak-based groups have formed at Peak Form — colleagues, couples and neighbours who train together regularly. To start a group, call us to discuss availability and we'll schedule an initial session to assess the group baseline. Groups formed together have more consistent programming than individuals joining random groups, because the trainer can write specifically for that cohort's goals.

faqs.question: What days and times are group sessions available?
faqs.answer: Group sessions run Monday to Friday at 6am, 7am, 12pm, 5:30pm and 6:30pm. Saturday sessions are available at 7:30am and 9am. Times are subject to availability — call to check current open spots.

seo.title: Small Group Training Toorak | Peak Form South Yarra Studio
seo.description: Small group personal training for Toorak clients. 5-minute drive from Toorak Village. Groups capped at 4, qualified trainer, from $55/person per session.

service_areas.headline: 1-on-1 Personal Training for Prahran Clients
service_areas.intro: Prahran clients reach our South Yarra studio via Chapel Street or the 72 tram. The studio is a 10-minute walk from Prahran Market and a short ride from the Prahran train station.
service_areas.body:
Prahran is well connected to our South Yarra studio. The 72 tram on Chapel Street runs to Toorak Rd, where the studio is located, in under 10 minutes. For Prahran clients without a car, this makes studio sessions practical without driving.

Persoanl training for Prahran clients covers the same structured format as all Peak Form sessions: a program written before you arrive, loads tracked throughout and an updated plan ready for next time. Prahran's mix of residents — hospitality workers with irregular hours, young professionals, established families — means the trainer adapts session times and program structures to fit varied schedules.

Casual sessions are available at $115 each. Block packages start at 5 sessions for $475, with a free assessment session for all new clients. The trainer also offers a lunchtime slot popular with Prahran clients who work from home and can fit a session in the middle of the day.
benefits: 10-minute tram from Chapel Street on route 72
Lunchtime session slots popular with work-from-home Prahran clients
Flexible scheduling for shift workers and irregular schedules
Free assessment session for all new Prahran clients

sections.heading: How the assessment session works
sections.body: New Prahran clients start with a 45-minute assessment — free of charge. This covers a movement screen, a conversation about training history and goals, and a short training block at controlled loads. The trainer uses this to set your starting program. There's no obligation to continue after the assessment, but most clients book their first paid session before they leave.

faqs.question: Can I do sessions more than once a week?
faqs.answer: Yes. Most clients train 2–4 times per week. The program is written to account for the training frequency you've committed to — rest days and recovery are built into the schedule, not left to chance.

seo.title: Personal Training Prahran | Peak Form South Yarra
seo.description: 1-on-1 personal training for Prahran clients at our South Yarra studio. 10-minute tram on Chapel Street route 72. From $95/session, free assessment for new clients.

service_areas.headline: Strength & Conditioning Training for Armadale Clients
service_areas.intro: Armadale clients access our South Yarra studio via Toorak Rd for periodised strength and conditioning programming. Sport-specific training available for local athletes.
service_areas.body:
Armadale is directly connected to South Yarra via Toorak Rd, making the 8-minute drive one of the more straightforward commutes in our catchment. Strength and conditioning clients from Armadale tend to have specific performance goals — sport return, strength targets, or movement quality after injury or inactivity.

The strength and conditioning program at Peak Form uses periodised blocks with defined strength targets. Each block lasts 4–8 weeks and advances based on measured results. For Armadale athletes, the trainer builds sport-specific blocks that peak the right physical qualities at competition time — not just pushing volume year-round.

The studio is equipped with a full barbell and rack setup, dumbbells across the full weight range, conditioning equipment and cable machines. Sessions are structured around compound movements with targeted accessory work. Load targets are set at or above current maxes, which is the key difference between a structured strength program and general gym training.
benefits: 8-minute drive from Armadale via Toorak Rd
Periodised blocks targeting specific strength qualities
Sport-specific programming for tennis, football and golf athletes
Monthly max testing to track strength progress accurately

sections.heading: Periodised programming explained
sections.body:
Periodisation means planning training in phases with different goals — building a strength base, then accumulating volume, then peaking for maximum effort. Each phase feeds into the next. Without this structure, most people stall after 3–6 months of training because their program isn't changing fast enough to drive adaptation.

For Armadale clients, the trainer maps out a 12–16 week block at the start of the engagement and sets strength targets for key lifts at the end of the block. Hitting those targets is the measure of success — not whether you felt tired after each session.

faqs.question: How heavy do strength sessions get?
faqs.answer: Load depends on your baseline and goals. The trainer sets starting loads based on the assessment and increases them progressively. By the end of a 12-week block, most clients are working at or above their previous 1-rep max on key movements. The progression is systematic — not about adding weight every session, but about accumulating the right stimulus over the block.

seo.title: Strength & Conditioning Armadale | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Periodised strength and conditioning for Armadale clients at our South Yarra studio. Sport-specific programming, monthly max testing. 8-minute drive via Toorak Rd.

service_areas.headline: Online Personal Training Coaching — Melbourne & Australia-Wide
service_areas.intro: Peak Form's online coaching service delivers full programming, weekly check-ins and form video reviews to clients anywhere in Melbourne or across Australia. Same qualified trainers, no studio commute required.
service_areas.body:
Online coaching from Peak Form is available to clients across Melbourne and Australia-wide. The service is built for people who travel frequently, prefer training at their own gym, or live outside our studio catchment but want structured programming from a qualified trainer.

The online format covers everything the in-studio service does, minus the in-person sessions: a custom 4-week training program, weekly check-in reviews where you report training results and the trainer responds with feedback, form video review within 24 hours, and a monthly program update based on progress data. Nutrition guidance is included in both pricing tiers.

Melbourne clients using online coaching typically train at commercial gyms across the inner suburbs — Fitness First, Virgin Active, F45 or local independent gyms. The trainer writes the program around whatever equipment your gym has. For clients with a home gym setup, the program is adjusted to available equipment without compromising the programming logic.
benefits: Available across Melbourne and Australia-wide
Program written for your actual gym or home setup
Weekly check-in with written trainer feedback
Form video review with corrections within 24 hours
No commute — train at a gym near home or work

sections.heading: How online coaching works in practice
sections.body:
After signing up, you complete an onboarding form covering training history, goals, available equipment and schedule. The trainer uses this to write your first 4-week training block. Every Sunday, you submit a brief check-in: which sessions you completed, how they felt and any relevant feedback. The trainer reviews this within 24 hours and notes any program adjustments.

Form video submissions work the same way — you upload a clip of a key movement and the trainer sends written notes on corrections, plus a demonstration video if needed. At the end of the 4-week block, the trainer assesses your data and writes the next block. You never have the same program twice.

sections.heading: Who online coaching suits
sections.body: Online coaching works well for clients who already have solid gym habits but lack direction, frequent travellers who need a program that travels with them, people who've done in-person training before and understand how to execute a program safely, and Melbourne clients who live outside the South Yarra catchment. It's less suitable for beginners with significant technique gaps — the in-person format is more appropriate for that.

faqs.question: Can I switch from online to in-person later?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many clients start with online coaching and move to in-person sessions when their schedule changes or they want direct coaching. The transition is seamless — the trainer already knows your program history.

faqs.question: Is there a minimum contract period?
faqs.answer: No. Online coaching is month-to-month. You can cancel before your next billing date without penalty. We don't offer week-to-week billing as the program works best over at least 4-week blocks, but there's no lock-in beyond the current month.

seo.title: Online Personal Training Melbourne | Peak Form Training
seo.description: Online coaching from Peak Form Training — custom programming, weekly check-ins and form video reviews. Available across Melbourne and Australia-wide. From $149/month.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Common questions about personal training at Peak Form Training in South Yarra.

items.question: Where is the studio located?
items.answer: The studio is at Studio 3, 221 Toorak Rd, South Yarra VIC 3141. It's a 6-minute walk from South Yarra train station and accessible by tram routes 58 and 8 on Chapel Street. Street parking is available on Toorak Rd and surrounding streets.

items.question: Do you offer a free first session?
items.answer: Yes. All new clients receive a complimentary 45-minute assessment session. This covers a movement screen, a conversation about your goals and training history, and a short training block at controlled loads. There's no obligation to book further sessions after the assessment.

items.question: Are there lock-in contracts?
items.answer: No. Sessions are sold in blocks (5, 10 or monthly unlimited) or casually. Block credits are valid for 12 months from purchase and unused credits are refundable if you can no longer train. Online coaching is month-to-month with cancellation before the next billing date.

items.question: What are your session prices?
items.answer: 1-on-1 personal training starts at $95 per session in blocks. Small group training (2–4 people) is from $55 per person. Online coaching starts at $149/month. The 12-week body transformation program starts at $1,890 for three sessions per week. Post-injury and rehabilitation training starts at $110 per session.

items.question: What qualifications do the trainers hold?
items.answer: All Peak Form trainers hold a Certificate IV in Fitness and current first-aid certification. The studio is fully insured for public liability. Trainers do not hold medical qualifications — for post-injury clients, we work alongside your GP or physiotherapist.

items.question: Can I train if I have a health condition or recent injury?
items.answer: Many clients train with existing conditions or in post-injury phases. For recent surgeries or complex injuries, we require written clearance from your GP or physiotherapist before starting. The trainer coordinates with your treating practitioner on load restrictions and progressions. We are a fitness service — not a medical or allied health provider.

items.question: How do I book?
items.answer: Call (03) 9826 4411 or email info@peakformtraining.com.au. The first step is the free assessment session — from there, the trainer will recommend the program format that suits your goals and budget.

items.question: Do you offer nutrition coaching?
items.answer: Nutrition guidance is included in the 12-week body transformation program and both online coaching tiers. For standalone sessions, the trainer can provide a practical nutrition framework as part of the program — this is not a substitute for dietitian advice and we don't provide clinical dietary prescriptions.

seo.title: FAQ — Peak Form Training South Yarra
seo.description: Answers to common questions about personal training at Peak Form Training in South Yarra. Pricing, session formats, qualifications, booking and more.

about.heading: About Peak Form Training
about.body:
Peak Form Training has operated from South Yarra for six years. The studio on Toorak Rd started as a single-trainer operation and now runs three qualified trainers across 1-on-1, group and online formats.

Every trainer at Peak Form holds a Certificate IV in Fitness and current first-aid certification. The studio carries full public liability insurance. We're not a franchise — the programming approach, session structure and client management systems are ours, developed through six years of tracking what actually works.

The client base covers a wide range: first-timers who've never been in a gym, competitive athletes in off-season training, older adults managing chronic conditions through exercise, and working professionals fitting three sessions per week around demanding schedules. The common thread is that they want their training to produce measurable results — not just feel hard.

We don't do before-and-after photos as a marketing tool. Progress is tracked through load records, body composition measurements and movement quality assessments. If you're doing better than you were six months ago on those metrics, the training is working.
about.licence: Cert IV Fitness | First Aid | Public Liability Insured

values.title: Structured programming
values.body: Every session is written before you arrive and updated based on what you did last time. No improvised workouts. No generic templates recycled across all clients.

values.title: Tracked results
values.body: Progress is measured in specific metrics — load on the bar, body composition data, timed performance. Not how you feel, not effort ratings. Concrete numbers that tell you whether the training is working.

values.title: No lock-in contracts
values.body: Sessions are sold in blocks with 12-month expiry or casually. Online coaching is month-to-month. You stay because the training works, not because you're contractually obligated.

values.title: Qualified trainers only
values.body: Every trainer holds a Cert IV in Fitness minimum, plus current first-aid. We don't take on trainers mid-study or with only a short-course qualification.

values.title: Small studio, focused sessions
values.body: The studio is designed for 2–3 concurrent clients maximum. No crowded floors, no equipment waits, no background noise that makes coaching ineffective.

values.title: Direct trainer communication
values.body: You deal with your trainer directly — not a receptionist or a booking platform. When something about your program needs to change, you call or message the trainer and it happens.

seo.title: About Peak Form Training | South Yarra Personal Training Studio
seo.description: Peak Form Training has operated in South Yarra for 6 years. Qualified trainers (Cert IV Fitness), structured programming and tracked results. No lock-in contracts.
